title: tilia platyphyllos subsp. pseudorubra
intro: Tilia platyphyllos subsp. pseudorubra, also known as the large-leaved lime or large-leaved linden, is a subspecies of the Tilia platyphyllos tree, commonly found in Europe. This plant has been used for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic qualities, which make it effective in soothing respiratory issues and calming the nervous system. The health benefits of Tilia platyphyllos subsp. pseudorubra include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of headaches and migraines. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal medicine to create capsules and topical creams.
